image_digest_source: run-pin.json:container_image_digest — the agent stamps the image digest into the host+container run-pin mirrors; the collector's run-probe path re-derives it from the created container (_container_image_digest) and refuses to archive on any disagreement.
model_config_note: thinking_model, action_model, sanitized_config, and prompt_bundle_sha256 are recorded per run in each run-pin.json. This panel pins neither model id nor config hash; the run-pin snapshot is authoritative and the collector verifies pin/behavior identity (feature_flags) bit-by-bit before archiving.

bigtop.data_generators_build_success: at least one successful data-generators build invocation in the control record
bigtop.note: compiled_classes_min = floor(0.8 * min(121,121,121)); executed/failed from the archived P baseline (final7 x3) 50/50. judgment/source predicates apply to fresh runs only (final7 predates the oracle fix — judgment/source null there).

httpcomponents-client.note: historical 1,856; the 16-test mis-scope must be impossible.

tvm.build_judgment_failed_physical_or_strict: build_evidence.judgment=='failed' AND build_evidence.source=='physical', OR verdict in {partial,success} with build_evidence.green
tvm.pytest_node_or_k_filter_while_unbuilt: every pytest invocation carries a node-id path or -k filter (--maxfail alone does NOT select)
tvm.note: collected_after_deselection is the structured python-tool result field; NEVER summary text. Evidence source mode pinned tool-emitted for the whole campaign; it may not switch mid-campaign.

pyyaml.note: unique_executed_min is CALIBRATED before the panel: three arm-P calibration runs (excluded from the 24-run panel), each valid only if every non-count anchor passes AND unique.executed>0; floor = max(1, floor(0.8 * min(executed over the three valid runs))); appended to campaign-ledger.jsonl before any panel run.

baseline_reds.note: Panel precondition (analyzer-diet.md:536-555): the SIX pre-existing SUITE failures registered in the campaign ledger at panel start; any NEW suite failure BLOCKS the panel. Suite reds, NOT probes. Matched by node-id keyword up to max_count; an accepted red that spreads to a new call site (count overflow) is a NEW regression that blocks.
